notes: T+1 historical replay case extended from Phase B's minimal_cycle/case_tushare_one_stock_one_cycle. Subject: 600519.SH 贵州茅台, cycle CYC_2026_03_31_DAILY — same cycle id + same manifest_cycle_id as the shared minimal_cycle Phase B case, so a consumer can chain 'minimal cycle published on this id' → 'replay the L6 alpha_result for 600519 from that published cycle' without inventing a second cycle axis. audit_record + replay_record content is synthetic (no real project-ult pipeline run was executed for this fixture — that would need a Lite stack + real Tushare token, out of sandbox scope); hashes are real sha256 over the documented construction recipe so reasoner-runtime regression can do hash-equality assertions against runtime sha256_text(). Per TUSHARE_TEST_FIXTURE_PLAN.md §Section-3 the canonical replay pack requires a real pipeline run — this case is the corpus-derived synthetic extension that keeps the replay shape testable in sandbox while the real pipeline variant is deferred to Phase E.
